title: pinus laricio subsp. poiretiana
intro: Pinus laricio subsp. poiretiana, also known as the Calabrian pine, is a subspecies of pine tree native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been found to be beneficial in treating various health issues. The Calabrian pine is known to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and providing antioxidant protection. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to treat respiratory issues, skin conditions, and other health problems.
